relatedness_reasoning: Inbound file contains customer product holdings and financial data; outbound file generates pre-approved credit offers targeting those customers. Marketing system consumes holdings data and produces credit offers for the credit department, forming a logical pipeline step. Multiple fields correspond (customer_id, account details, balance/credit metrics).

mappings.reasoning: System-generated unique identifier for the offer; no source in inbound data.
Direct match: customer identifier from holdings array used to target offer.

Fixed enum value 'marketing' representing the sending department; not derived from inbound schema.

Both are ISO 8601 timestamps; outbound timestamp likely generated at offer creation time, possibly derived from or aligned with inbound processing timestamp.
